features: INVIGORATING SHOWER GEL: This Blue Cypress and Eucalyptus Imperial Leather body wash has a luxurious creamy lather, leaving skin soft and clean
LUXURY FRAGRANCE: Our shower gel is bursting with a Blue Cypress and Eucalyptus - Fresh ocean and wood scent
RICH LATHER: Imperial Leather Shower Gel transforms into clouds of rich, creamy lather for a decadent experience - leaving you invigorated and revived
SKIN CARE: Our shower gel is dermatologically tested and suitable for all skin types - gentle body wash made for self care
BULK BUY: This pack of 6 x bottles of shower gel is a great bulk buy for the whole family.
description: Product Description The fresh, woody scent of Imperial Leather Invigorating Body Wash evokes images of the ocean, waves and sea minerals for a full, marine-scented immersion. An invigorating citrus facet brings energy while notes of cedarwood and rich sandalwood layer smoothly on the subtle lily of the valley. Finally a comforting softness of amber completes the story by toning the fresh herbs. Featuring Imperial Leather's iconic rich, creamy lather, enriched with our signature oil blend, experience an everyday indulgent experience with an icy cool fragrance designed to wake and invigorate your skin and senses. Unleash the lathery goodness! Ingredients Aqua/Water, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum/Fragrance, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Lactic Acid, PEG-200 Hydrogenated Glyceryl Palmate, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Polyquaternium-7, PEG-6 Caprylic/Capric Glycerides, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Sodium Chloride, Limonene, Linalool, Benzyl Salicylate, CI 42090/Blue 1, CI 14700/Red 4. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. See more
